lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint, showroom condition, having been meticulously kept in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint is flawless with no chips or scratches, and the interior still smells new, showing zero signs of wear on the leather or trim. It has been serviced exclusively at the dealership and comes with a full history of its preventative maintenance. This is a rare find for a collector or enthusiast who demands perfection.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It is currently operational but shows noticeable wear on the exterior and interior, and some mechanical components will require attention soon.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom-state condition, reflecting a history of fastidious maintenance and climate-controlled preservation. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the highest standards of quality, exhibiting no discernible wear. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that presents with the same integrity as the day it was manufactured. We invite serious inquiries for this uncompromising investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible, like-new condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-parked, and stayed on top of every single service. It’s a total dream to drive and honestly looks stunning from every angle. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and ready for its next adventure, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is an investment-grade 1994 Mazda RX-7 (FD3S) in pristine, factory-original condition. This specimen features the legendary 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine, delivering linear power through a crisp 5-speed manual transaxle. The chassis maintains its celebrated 50/50 weight distribution, supported by a lightweight aluminum double-wishbone suspension setup and four-piston front calipers. Mechanically flawless, the sequential boost transition is seamless, and the Torsen limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction. Zero evidence of thermal fatigue or vacuum system degradation. This is a collector-tier example with a documented service history and robust compression figures, representing the pinnacle of 90s JDM engineering.
2021 sedan. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Inspection ready.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that defines 'mint' condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its showroom shine. The exterior features a flawless factory paint finish, recently treated with a professional ceramic coating, and is entirely free of rock chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in as-new condition; the premium leather seats show zero wear, the original floor mats are pristine, and the 'new car' scent lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, with a complete service history documented at the original dealership and recent preventive maintenance performed ahead of schedule. It drives as smoothly as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a custom car cover. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that has been treated with unparalleled care.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in showroom condition, featuring flawless exterior surfaces and a pristine interior cabin. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its original factory specifications. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous ownership and uncompromising care.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty. It’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor—completely spotless inside and out, and it drives like an absolute dream. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it really shows in every little detail. If you’re looking for that perfect, brand-new feel without the dealership headache, this is the one for you! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Come say hi and take it for a spin!

Offering a museum-grade 1995 Mazda RX-7 (FD3S), a benchmark of 90s Japanese engineering. This specimen features the legendary 13B-REW twin-rotor engine, retaining its original sequential twin-turbocharger configuration with seamless transition and zero boost leaks. The powertrain delivers linear torque through a 5-speed manual gearbox to a Torsen limited-slip differential. The chassis is impeccably preserved, maintaining its factory-spec 50:50 weight distribution and four-wheel double-wishbone suspension geometry. All critical vacuum lines have been preemptively upgraded to high-temp silicone to ensure long-term reliability of the complex control system. Compression test results show optimal, uniform pressure across all rotor faces. The exterior paint retains its factory depth, while the interior remains free of the typical plastics degradation common to this platform. This is a turn-key, investment-grade rotary enthusiast's dream. Pre-purchase inspections are welcomed to verify its mechanical excellence.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full maintenance records. Clean title.
